title: Man from the future
html:
Man from the future

Stub. Recurring self-frame in which Yahir treats his current self as a time-traveler from the future visiting the present — a way to compress regret and decision-making. Touches the cyclical time reading and the One Hundred Years of Solitude reading-log entry.
